model.snapshot_note: The provider does not expose a frozen checkpoint hash; the endpoint alias, date, prompt, and archived outputs define this API snapshot.

context.source_rehydration: Every ranked candidate file is read from the official base commit before rendering; archived snippets are not trusted as source authority.
context.non_source_candidates: Retained as path, signature, span, and ranking metadata while the prompt budget permits.
context.overflow_rule: Drop lowest-ranked metadata records until the complete prompt is within 5000 tokens.

candidate_pool_construction.glm_only: Frozen issue-conditioned GLM candidate pool under the Top-20 ceiling.
candidate_pool_construction.glm_bm25_local: Frozen archived GLM/BM25-local fusion candidate pool under the Top-20 ceiling.
candidate_pool_construction.glm_mural: Frozen archived GLM/MURAL fusion candidate pool under the Top-20 ceiling.
candidate_pool_construction.relation_to_rq2: RQ-4 varies the complete supplied candidate pool. These repair pools are not the exact prefix-preserving ledgers used by the RQ-2 localization control.

retry.activation: Only when the first response yields no applicable code change.
retry.selection_rule: Use the first locally applicable patch; test outcomes never activate a retry or select a patch.

patch_format: SEARCH/REPLACE converted to a unified diff and checked against the official base commit

identical_patch_evaluation.identity: instance_id plus SHA-256 of the exact unified diff
identical_patch_evaluation.rule: An identical patch for the same instance is evaluated once and that official oracle outcome is mapped to every producing context variant, avoiding duplicate test executions.

test_oracle_use: Official evaluation only; never used in generation, retry activation, context rendering, or patch selection.
input_boundary: Original issue report and one frozen base-commit candidate pool: GLM-only, GLM plus BM25-local, or GLM plus MURAL.
glm_only_label_semantics: The GLM-only label describes the upstream localizer. The repair prompt still renders base-commit source from the resulting GLM candidates.
